question: ප්‍රශ්නය
name: නම
title: මාතෘකාව
nav_mark_read_error: දැනුම්දීම් කියවූ බව සලකුණු කිරීම අසාර්ථකයි.
footer_admin_desc: එක් වැඩබිමකින් බෙදාහැරීම, වාර්තා සහ ඉගෙනුම්කරුවන්ගේ ප්‍රගතිය කළමනාකරණය කරන්න.
footer_learner_desc: ඔබේ කාලසටහන, උත්සාහයන් සහ එන විභාග එක් තැනක තබා ගන්න.

signup_hero_note: ඔබේ ඉගෙනුම්කරු ගිණුම එක් වරක් සාදන්න, ඉන්පසු එම වැඩබිමෙන්ම විභාග, කාලසටහන් සහ ප්‍රතිඵල කළමනාකරණය කරන්න.

signup_helper_text: ඔබේ ආයතනය බලාපොරොත්තු වන ඊමේල් සහ ඉගෙනුම්කරු හැඳුනුම්පත භාවිතා කරන්න. මුරපද අවම වශයෙන් අක්ෂර 8ක් විය යුතුය.

instructions_identity_check_helper: නීති තිරයට ඇතුළු වීමට පෙර අනන්‍යතා ග්‍රහණය අවශ්‍යයි.

instructions_cam_mic_screen_requested: කැමරාව, මයික්‍රෆෝනය සහ සම්පූර්ණ-තිරය බෙදාගැනීම ඉල්ලා සිටිනු ලැබේ.
instructions_cam_mic_requested: කැමරාව සහ මයික්‍රෆෝන අවසරයන් ඉල්ලා සිටිනු ලැබේ.
instructions_no_proctoring: මෙම පරීක්ෂණය සඳහා අධීක්ෂණ පරීක්ෂාවන් සක්‍රීය කර නැත.
instructions_cam_mic_monitored: ඔබේ කැමරාව සහ මයික්‍රෆෝනය නිරීක්ෂණය කරනු ලැබේ.
instructions_quiet_environment: ඔබ නිසල, හොඳ ආලෝකයක් ඇති පරිසරයක සිටින බව සහතික කරන්න.
rules_subtitle: ආරම්භ කිරීමට පෙර කරුණාකර පහත නීති කියවා පිළිගන්න
rules_no_external_resources: පරීක්ෂණය අතරතුර බාහිර සම්පත්, පොත් හෝ සටහන් භාවිතා නොකරන්න.
rules_no_communication: පරීක්ෂණය අතරතුර අන් අය සමඟ සන්නිවේදනය නොකරන්න.
rules_face_visible: සෑම විටම ඔබේ මුහුණ කැමරාවේ පෙනෙන ලෙස තබන්න.
rules_no_mobile: ජංගම දුරකථනයක් හෝ වෙනත් ඉලෙක්ට්‍රොනික උපාංගයක් භාවිතා නොකරන්න.
rules_suspicious_flagged: ඕනෑම සැක සහිත හැසිරීමක් සලකුණු කර වාර්තා කරනු ලැබේ.
rules_violations_termination: උල්ලංඝනය පරීක්ෂණය අවසන් කිරීමට හෝ ලකුණු අවලංගු කිරීමට හේතු විය හැක.
rules_invalid_link: වලංගු නොවන පරීක්ෂණ සබැඳිය. ලැයිස්තුවට ආපසු ගොස් නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
rules_load_error: පරීක්ෂණ නීති සහ අවශ්‍යතා පූරණය කිරීමට අසමත් විය. ආරම්භ කිරීමට පෙර නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
rules_system_check_passed: මෙම බ්‍රවුසර සැසිය අවශ්‍ය උපාංග පරීක්ෂාවන් දැනටමත් සමත් වී ඇත.
rules_system_check_pending: සජීවී උත්සාහයට ඇතුළු වීමට පෙර පද්ධති පරීක්ෂාවට ආපසු යන්න.
rules_camera_helper: පරීක්ෂණය අතරතුර ඔබේ කැමරාව ඔබව පටිගත කරනු ඇත.
rules_mic_helper: පරීක්ෂණය අතරතුර ඔබේ මයික්‍රෆෝනය ශ්‍රව්‍ය සඳහා නිරීක්ෂණය කරනු ලැබේ.
rules_screen_helper: සජීවී උත්සාහය ආරම්භ වීමට පෙර ඔබේ සම්පූර්ණ තිරය බෙදා ගත යුතුය. බෙදාගැනීම නැවැත්වුවහොත් ඔබෙන් නැවත ඉල්ලා සිටිනු ඇත.
rules_fullscreen_helper: පරීක්ෂණය සම්පූර්ණ-තිර ආකාරයේ ධාවනය වේ. සම්පූර්ණ තිරයෙන් පිටවීම සලකුණු කරනු ලැබේ.
rules_identity_helper: උත්සාහයට ඇතුළු වීමට පෙර අනන්‍යතා සත්‍යාපනය පරීක්ෂා කරනු ලැබේ.
rules_system_check_warning: මෙම බ්‍රවුසර සැසියේ පද්ධති පරීක්ෂාව තවම සම්පූර්ණ වී නැත. සජීවී උත්සාහය ආරම්භ කිරීමට පෙර පරීක්ෂා තිරයට ආපසු යන්න.
rules_unavailable: පරීක්ෂණ වින්‍යාසය සාර්ථකව පූරණය වන තෙක් නීති ලබා ගත නොහැක.
rules_agree_label: මම සියලුම පරීක්ෂණ නීති කියවා එකඟ වන අතර ඉහත විස්තර කර ඇති නිරීක්ෂණයට එකඟ වෙමි
rules_complete_system_check: පරීක්ෂණය ආරම්භ කිරීමට පෙර මෙම බ්‍රවුසර සැසියේ පද්ධති පරීක්ෂාව සම්පූර්ණ කරන්න.
rules_not_ready: පරීක්ෂණ නීති තවම සූදානම් නැත. ආරම්භ කිරීමට පෙර නීති නැවත පූරණය කරන්න.
rules_must_accept: ආරම්භ කිරීමට පෙර ඔබ නීති පිළිගත යුතුය.
rules_attempt_error: මෙම පරීක්ෂණය සඳහා සක්‍රීය උත්සාහයක් සෑදීමට හෝ සොයා ගැනීමට අසමත් විය.
rules_fullscreen_required: පරීක්ෂණය ආරම්භ වීමට පෙර සම්පූර්ණ තිරය අවශ්‍යයි. කරුණාකර සම්පූර්ණ තිරයට ඉඩ දී නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
syscheck_subtitle: ඔබේ පද්ධතිය අවශ්‍යතා සපුරන බව අපට සත්‍යාපනය කිරීමට අවශ්‍යයි
syscheck_mic_release_error: මයික්‍රෆෝන නිරීක්ෂකය පිරිසිදුව මුදා හැරිය නොහැකි විය. මයික්‍රෆෝනය ලබා ගත නොහැකි නම් පිටුව නැවුම් කරන්න.
syscheck_entire_screen_error: ඔබ සම්පූර්ණ තිරය බෙදා ගත යුතුය, එක් කවුළුවක් හෝ ටැබ් එකක් නොවේ.
syscheck_screen_denied: තිර බෙදාගැනීම ප්‍රතික්ෂේප විය. ඉදිරියට යාමට ඔබේ සම්පූර්ණ තිරය බෙදා ගන්න.
syscheck_screen_start_error: තිර බෙදාගැනීම ආරම්භ කළ නොහැකි විය. නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
syscheck_invalid_link: වලංගු නොවන පරීක්ෂණ සබැඳිය. ලැයිස්තුවට ආපසු ගොස් නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
syscheck_load_config_error: පරීක්ෂණ වින්‍යාසය පූරණය කිරීමට අසමත් විය. කරුණාකර නැවුම් කර නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
syscheck_allow_camera: කරුණාකර කැමරා ප්‍රවේශයට ඉඩ දී නැවුම් කරන්න.
syscheck_speak_confirm: මයික්‍රෆෝන මට්ටම තහවුරු කිරීමට කතා කරන්න.
syscheck_share_screen_hint: සජීවී උත්සාහය තවත් අවසර ඉල්ලීමකින් තොරව ආරම්භ විය හැකි පරිදි දැන් ඔබේ තිරය බෙදා ගන්න.
syscheck_enter_fullscreen_hint: ඉදිරියට යාමට සම්පූර්ණ තිරයට ඇතුළු වන්න.
syscheck_fullscreen_required: මෙම පරීක්ෂණය සඳහා සම්පූර්ණ තිරය අවශ්‍යයි.
verify_subtitle: සජීවී සෙල්ෆියක් ගෙන පැහැදිලි හැඳුනුම්පත් රූපයක් ලබා දෙන්න
verify_identity_required_helper: ඉගෙනුම්කරුට ඉදිරියට යාමට පෙර සෙල්ෆිය සහ හැඳුනුම්පත් සාක්ෂි අවශ්‍යයි.
verify_identity_skipped_helper: මෙම පරීක්ෂණය අනන්‍යතා සත්‍යාපනය මඟ හරියි.
verify_camera_required_helper: ඔබේ සෙල්ෆිය සහ අධීක්ෂණය සඳහා සජීවී කැමරා ප්‍රවේශය අවශ්‍යයි.
verify_camera_optional_helper: ඔබේ සෙල්ෆිය සඳහා කැමරා ප්‍රවේශය අවශ්‍යයි.
verify_lighting_required_helper: ලකුණ අඩු මට්ටමේ පවතින්නේ නම් දීප්තිමත් ආලෝකයට යන්න.
verify_lighting_disabled_helper: මෙම පරීක්ෂණය සඳහා අඩු-ආලෝක ප්‍රතික්ෂේපය අක්‍රීය කර ඇත.
verify_id_typed_helper: ඔබ ටයිප් කළ හැඳුනුම්පත් අංකය ඔබේ ඡායාරූප සමඟ යවනු ලැබේ.
verify_id_auto_helper: හැඳුනුම්පත් අංකය ස්වයංක්‍රීයව හඳුනා නොගත්තොත් ඉගෙනුම්කරුට අතින් ටයිප් කළ හැක.
verify_camera_access_error: අනන්‍යතා සත්‍යාපනය සඳහා කැමරා ප්‍රවේශය අවශ්‍යයි. කරුණාකර ප්‍රවේශයට ඉඩ දී නැවත පූරණය කරන්න.
verify_invalid_link: වලංගු නොවන පරීක්ෂණ සබැඳිය. ලැයිස්තුවට ආපසු ගොස් නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
verify_load_requirements_error: පරීක්ෂණ සත්‍යාපන අවශ්‍යතා පූරණය කිරීමට අසමත් විය. කරුණාකර නැවුම් කර නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
verify_fullscreen_picker_warning: බ්‍රවුසර ගොනු තේරීම විවෘත කිරීමෙන් සම්පූර්ණ තිරයෙන් පිටවිය හැක. ඉදිරියට යාමට පෙර සම්පූර්ණ තිරයට ආපසු යන්න.
verify_camera_not_ready: කැමරාව සූදානම් නැත. කරුණාකර ප්‍රවේශයට ඉඩ දී නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
verify_invalid_image: කරුණාකර වලංගු හැඳුනුම්පත් රූප ගොනුවක් උඩුගත කරන්න.
verify_load_id_error: හැඳුනුම්පත් රූපය පූරණය කිරීමට අසමත් විය.
verify_config_not_loaded: පරීක්ෂණ අවශ්‍යතා පූරණය නොවූ නිසා අනන්‍යතාවය සත්‍යාපනය කළ නොහැක.

admin_manage_coupon_removed: මෙම කෙටුම්පතෙන් කූපනය ඉවත් කරන ලදි.
admin_manage_err_coupon_count: කූපන් ගණන 1 සහ 100 අතර විය යුතුය.
admin_manage_err_coupon_amount: කූපන් මුදල 0 ට වඩා වැඩි විය යුතුය.
admin_manage_cert_cleared: මෙම කෙටුම්පතෙන් සහතිකය ඉවත් කරන ලදි.
admin_manage_err_no_cert_sources: සහතික සැකසුම් සහිත වෙනත් පරීක්ෂණ හමු නොවිය.
admin_manage_err_cert_sources: සහතික ප්‍රභවයන් පූරණය කිරීමට අපොහොසත් විය.
admin_manage_err_choose_cert: වලංගු සහතික සැකසුමක් සහිත පරීක්ෂණයක් තෝරන්න.
admin_manage_category_created: වර්ගය සාදා මෙම පරීක්ෂණ කෙටුම්පතට පවරන ලදි.
admin_wizard_detector_face_desc: Detect presence and count of faces
admin_wizard_detector_head_desc: Detect sustained head turns and posture changes
admin_wizard_req_identity_desc: Require selfie and ID checks before the learner enters the attempt.
admin_wizard_req_camera_desc: Block the journey if the camera is unavailable.
admin_wizard_req_mic_desc: Block the journey if the microphone is unavailable.
admin_wizard_req_lighting_desc: Require the webcam feed to pass the minimum lighting score.
admin_wizard_req_fullscreen_desc: Require fullscreen during the active attempt.
admin_wizard_req_tab_desc: Track focus loss, tab switches, and hidden pages.
admin_wizard_req_clipboard_desc: Disable copy and paste shortcuts during the attempt.
admin_wizard_req_screen_desc: Request screen share and save a screen recording with timed snapshots for later review.
admin_wizard_pcg_identity_desc: Tune how strict the journey checks are before the learner can start.
admin_wizard_pcg_attention_desc: Control how aggressively gaze, posture, speech, and mouth movement are flagged.
admin_wizard_pcg_enforcement_desc: Define when repeated violations should escalate to an automatic submission.
admin_wizard_pcg_capture_desc: Control how often visual/audio evidence is sampled and sent for analysis.
admin_wizard_ctrl_face_absence_desc: Lower is stricter. Missing faces trigger alerts sooner.
admin_wizard_ctrl_lighting_min_desc: Higher is stricter. Darker rooms will fail the precheck.
admin_wizard_ctrl_face_verify_id_desc: Lower is stricter. Tightens selfie-to-ID matching.
admin_wizard_ctrl_face_verify_desc: Lower is stricter. Tightens ongoing face verification.
admin_wizard_ctrl_object_conf_desc: Higher is stricter. Require stronger model confidence before flagging objects.
admin_wizard_ctrl_multi_face_area_desc: Higher is stricter about ignoring tiny false-positive faces before raising a multiple-face alert.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_cover_hard_desc: Frames darker than this trigger an immediate camera-covered streak.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_cover_soft_desc: Dark flat frames below this luma can trigger a softer camera-covered streak.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_stddev_desc: Lower values require the frame to be flatter before it counts as softly covered.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_hard_frames_desc: How many fully blocked frames are needed before warning immediately.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_soft_frames_desc: How many dark flat frames are needed before warning for a covered camera.
admin_wizard_ctrl_eye_angle_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller gaze drift triggers alerts.
admin_wizard_ctrl_eye_frames_desc: Lower is stricter. Fewer frames are needed before flagging.
admin_wizard_ctrl_head_yaw_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller side turns count as suspicious.
admin_wizard_ctrl_head_pitch_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller up/down head motion is flagged.
admin_wizard_ctrl_head_frames_desc: Lower is stricter. Head pose changes trigger sooner.
admin_wizard_ctrl_mouth_thresh_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller mouth motion can trigger talking alerts.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_rms_desc: Lower is stricter. Quieter noise can trigger audio alerts.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_chunks_desc: Lower is stricter. Fewer noisy chunks are needed before alerting.
admin_wizard_ctrl_speech_chunks_desc: Lower is stricter. Fewer speech-like chunks are needed before the anomaly path fires.
admin_wizard_ctrl_speech_rms_desc: Raise this to ignore quieter background noise when speech detection is enabled.
admin_wizard_ctrl_speech_mult_desc: Higher values require speech-like audio to stand out more clearly above the rolling baseline.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_window_desc: How many recent chunks are considered when detecting sustained audio anomalies.
admin_wizard_ctrl_max_tab_desc: Lower is stricter. The attempt can auto-submit after fewer focus losses.
admin_wizard_ctrl_max_alerts_desc: Auto-submit after this many alerts are logged.
admin_wizard_ctrl_max_score_desc: Auto-submit after the weighted violation score crosses this number.
admin_wizard_ctrl_consec_frames_desc: Fallback consecutive frame count shared by sustained detectors.
admin_wizard_ctrl_frame_interval_desc: Higher saves bandwidth. Lower gives denser monitoring.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_chunk_desc: Higher sends fewer but larger audio chunks.
admin_wizard_ctrl_screenshot_desc: Only used when screen recording is enabled.
admin_wizard_alert_fullscreen_exit_desc: Learner exits fullscreen during the attempt.
admin_wizard_alert_tab_switch_desc: Browser loses focus because the learner switched tabs or apps.
admin_wizard_alert_focus_loss_desc: The test window loses focus or becomes hidden.
admin_wizard_alert_camera_covered_desc: The webcam feed is blocked or too dark.
admin_wizard_alert_no_face_desc: The learner moves out of frame for too long.
admin_wizard_alert_multiple_faces_desc: More than one face appears in the camera view.
admin_wizard_alert_face_mismatch_desc: Live face does not match the verified identity sample.
admin_wizard_alert_loud_audio_desc: Sudden loud noise or speech is detected.
admin_wizard_alert_audio_anomaly_desc: Repeated suspicious audio activity is detected.
admin_wizard_alert_forbidden_obj_desc: Phone, book, or other forbidden object is detected.
admin_wizard_alert_eye_movement_desc: Gaze deviates away from the screen for too long.
admin_wizard_alert_head_pose_desc: The learner turns away or changes head pose suspiciously.
admin_wizard_alert_mouth_movement_desc: Talking or sustained mouth movement is detected.
admin_wizard_action_flag_helper: Creates a proctoring escalation event for admins to review later.
admin_wizard_action_warn_helper: Shows a live warning to the learner and keeps the exam running.
admin_wizard_action_submit_helper: Immediately submits the exam when the rule threshold is reached.
admin_wizard_val_course_title_required: Enter a course title before creating one.
admin_wizard_val_course_create_failed: Failed to create the course. Please try again.
admin_wizard_val_setup_partial: Some setup data failed to load. The wizard is still usable with the data that is available.
admin_wizard_val_setup_failed: Failed to load setup data. Retry the page to continue.
admin_wizard_val_code_length: External code / ID must be between 6 and 12 characters.
admin_wizard_val_select_module: Select or create a module before continuing.
admin_wizard_val_generator_count: Please set a total question count for the generator.
admin_wizard_val_generator_mix: Generator difficulty mix must total exactly 100%.
admin_wizard_val_time_limit: Provide a valid time limit or enable unlimited time.
admin_wizard_val_passing_score: Passing score must be between 0 and 100.
admin_wizard_val_max_attempts: Max attempts must be at least 1.
admin_wizard_val_neg_marking: Negative marking must be zero or higher.
admin_wizard_val_cert_title: Enter a certificate title or disable certificates.
admin_wizard_val_cert_signer: Enter a certificate signer or disable certificates.
admin_wizard_val_restricted_schedule: Restricted assignments require a scheduled date and time.
admin_wizard_val_save_assignments: Save learner assignment changes before continuing.
admin_wizard_val_add_question: Add at least one question before publishing.
admin_wizard_val_locked: Published and archived tests must be edited from Manage Tests.
admin_wizard_val_module_failed: Could not create module. Please try again.
admin_wizard_val_save_failed: සුරැකීමට නොහැකි විය. කරුණාකර අවශ්‍ය ක්ෂේත්‍ර පරීක්ෂා කර නැවත උත්සාහ කරන්න.
admin_wizard_val_pool_empty: This pool has no questions yet. Open the pool and add questions before seeding this test.
admin_wizard_val_pool_seed_failed: Failed to seed questions from pool.
admin_wizard_val_ai_topic_required: Enter a topic for AI generation.
admin_wizard_val_schedule_required: Restricted access requires a scheduled date and time.
admin_wizard_val_assign_failed: Failed to assign sessions. Please try again.
admin_wizard_val_publish_failed: Could not save. Please add questions and try again.
admin_wizard_val_autosave_failed: Autosave failed. Check your connection and try again.
admin_wizard_val_create_test_failed: Could not create the test yet. Please check required fields and try again.
admin_wizard_val_no_learners_match: None of the pasted learners matched the current learner list.
admin_wizard_val_paste_first: Paste learner IDs, emails, or user IDs first.
admin_wizard_val_no_learners: There are no learners available to assign yet.
admin_wizard_val_no_search_match: No learners match the current search.
admin_wizard_card_questions_needed: Questions still need to be added
admin_wizard_review_add_first: Add at least one question first
admin_wizard_review_next_phase_desc: Assign learners and schedule access in Step 7
admin_wizard_description_placeholder: Describe the test purpose, scope, and any special instructions...
admin_wizard_no_courses_hint: No courses yet. Create one here and the wizard will keep going.
admin_wizard_no_modules_hint: No modules in this course. The wizard will create Module 1 automatically.
admin_wizard_create_course_hint: This creates a draft course and its first module without leaving the wizard.
admin_wizard_course_desc_placeholder: Optional description for the training course...
admin_wizard_method_manual_desc: Pick questions from pools or create them manually. Define exactly which questions appear in each test version.
admin_wizard_method_generator_desc: Let the system automatically select questions based on your criteria. Creates unique test versions per candidate.
admin_wizard_ai_hint: Enter a topic and let the model draft questions, then we save them into this test.
admin_wizard_mix_hint: Totals can exceed or fall below 100. They are normalized during generation.
admin_wizard_categories_hint: Leave empty to allow all categories.
admin_wizard_pools_hint: If none selected, generator can draw from any pool.
admin_wizard_prevent_reuse: Prevent reusing same question across versions
admin_wizard_proctoring_intro: This is the dedicated proctoring phase. Configure delivery rules, AI monitoring, special accommodations, and live candidate controls here before you publish.
admin_wizard_escalate_hint: Choose which alert matters, how many repeats are allowed, what severity gets logged, and what the exam should do when the threshold is reached.
admin_wizard_no_rules: No custom alert rules yet. The global auto-submit thresholds still apply until you add a rule here.
admin_wizard_trigger_hint: Count of matching alerts before this rule fires.
admin_wizard_severity_hint: Severity stored on the escalation event for review and reporting.
admin_wizard_message_placeholder: Optional custom message shown when this rule fires
admin_wizard_enable_above: Enable it above or the rule will never fire.
admin_wizard_questions_intro: Add questions directly or seed from a question pool.
admin_wizard_pool_available: question(s) available in this pool for seeding.
admin_wizard_pool_empty_hint: This pool is empty. Open Question Pools and add questions before seeding.
admin_wizard_creating_test: Creating the test so you can add questions...
admin_wizard_hang_tight: Hang tight while we create the test so you can start adding questions right away.
admin_wizard_passing_hint_suffix: % on the entire test to pass.
admin_wizard_enable_neg_marking: Enable negative marking for wrong answers
admin_wizard_show_final_score: Show final score to candidate after submission
admin_wizard_conduct_hint: These map to runtime enforcement: fullscreen prompts, visibility/tab pings, optional screen grabs, and clipboard locking.
admin_wizard_cert_after_review: Learners can download the certificate only after an admin or instructor approves it from Attempt Analysis.
admin_wizard_cert_positive_proctoring: Medium and high proctoring alerts will block certificate download.
admin_wizard_cert_after_pass: The certificate becomes available as soon as the learner passes.
admin_wizard_sessions_intro: Assign this test to learners with a scheduled date and time.
admin_wizard_save_first: Save the test first (go back and advance through steps).
admin_wizard_restricted_warning: Restricted access requires a scheduled date and time before assignments can be saved.
admin_wizard_save_warning: Save assignments to persist the current learner selection before continuing.
admin_wizard_assigned_preselected: Existing assigned learners are preselected. Save assignments to update their access mode or scheduled time.
admin_wizard_bulk_hint: Paste learner IDs, emails, or internal IDs separated by commas or new lines.
admin_wizard_save_intro: Choose the initial status for this test. You can change it later from the Manage Tests page.
admin_wizard_publish_warning: Drafts can be saved without questions. Publishing still requires at least one question.
error_boundary_message: Reload the page to try again. If the problem continues, return to the previous page and retry the action.
admin_roles_admin_desc: Full platform access, including system settings, user groups, and role management.
admin_roles_instructor_desc: Can reach only the admin utility pages that are explicitly granted in this matrix, such as attempt analysis or scheduling.
admin_roles_learner_desc: Self-service access to assigned tests, schedules, and personal attempt history.
admin_roles_invalid_permissions: Stored permissions were invalid. Showing default values.
admin_roles_load_error: Failed to load permission settings. Showing defaults.
admin_roles_defaults_restored: Restored the default matrix. Save to apply it.
admin_videos_still_processing: This recording is still processing. Refresh in a moment.
admin_videos_failed_to_process: This recording failed to process and cannot be played.
admin_videos_no_playable_file: This recording does not have a playable file yet.
admin_videos_not_ready_to_stream: This recording is not ready to stream yet.

admin_videos_recordings_load_failed: Video recordings could not be loaded. Retry to fetch the saved files.
admin_videos_events_load_failed: Warning events could not be loaded. Video playback remains available.
admin_videos_no_playback_url: The selected recording does not have a usable playback URL.

admin_videos_evidence_load_failed: Evidence screenshots could not be loaded.
admin_videos_browser_cannot_play: This browser cannot play the selected stream.
admin_videos_stream_play_failed: The selected stream could not be played.
admin_videos_all_saved_recordings: All saved browser recordings for this attempt
admin_videos_filtered_warning_count: Current filtered warning count shown on the timeline
admin_videos_high_severity_events: High-severity events in the active filter set
admin_videos_timeline_duration: Video or reconstructed event duration currently in view
admin_videos_no_attempts_found: No attempts found for this test yet.
admin_videos_no_recordings_saved: No video recordings are saved yet for this attempt.
admin_videos_no_warnings_detected: No warning events detected for this attempt.
admin_videos_no_warnings_in_recording: No warning events fall within the selected recording.
admin_videos_no_warnings_match_filters: No warning events match the active filters.

admin_analysis_save_review_error: Failed to save certificate review decision.
admin_analysis_select_attempt_hint: Select an attempt to review its integrity timeline, answers, and evidence.
admin_analysis_no_answers: No answers recorded for this attempt.
admin_analysis_identity_photo_precheck: Identity verification photo captured during precheck.
admin_analysis_certificate_available: The learner can download the certificate right now.
admin_analysis_certificate_approved_noti: Certificate release approved after proctoring review.
admin_analysis_certificate_rejected_noti: Certificate release rejected after proctoring review.
admin_analysis_partial_load_warning: Some analysis data could not be loaded. Retry to refresh.
admin_favorites_save_failed: Failed to save. Please try again.
admin_favorites_invalid_link: Links must use http(s):// or a supported admin route such as /admin/reports.
admin_favorites_route_unavailable: This saved route is no longer available. Remove it or replace it with a supported page.

admin_templates_save_failed: Could not save template. Check JSON config.
admin_templates_empty_state: Saved reusable templates will appear here once you create or import them.
admin_subscribers_already_in_list: These subscribers are already in the list.
admin_subscribers_empty_state: Saved report recipients will appear here once you add email addresses.
admin_schedules_required_fields: User, test, and scheduled time are required.
admin_surveys_choice_min_options: Single and multiple choice questions need at least two options.
admin_groups_bulk_assign_required: Choose a test, a schedule, and at least one member.
admin_groups_bootstrap_groups_failed: Group data could not be loaded. Retry to continue.
admin_groups_bootstrap_partial_failed: Some group management data could not be loaded. Retry to enable member assignment and bulk scheduling.
admin_groups_bootstrap_load_failed: Group management data could not be loaded. Retry to continue.
admin_groups_learner_lookup_unavailable: Learner lookup is temporarily unavailable. Retry to manage group members.
admin_groups_search_learners_placeholder: Search learners by name, email, or ID...
admin_groups_all_learners_assigned: All available learners are already assigned to this group.
admin_groups_bulk_assignment_description: Assign all group members to a test at once.
admin_groups_test_schedule_unavailable: Test and schedule data are temporarily unavailable. Retry before running bulk assignments.
admin_manage_no_attempts_match_filters: No attempts match the current monitoring filters.
admin_manage_clear_filters_hint: Clear the current session or column filters to restore the full monitoring list.
admin_manage_attempts_will_appear: Attempts will appear here once learners begin this test.

admin_manage_err_attachment_import_inval: No valid attachment rows were found.

admin_manage_attachments_imported: Attachments added. Save settings to persist them.
admin_manage_coupons_generated: Coupons generated. Save settings to persist them.

admin_surveys_rating_hint: Learners will see a 1 to 5 rating scale.
admin_surveys_boolean_hint: Learners will answer Yes or No.
admin_surveys_read_only: Read-only — only the owner or an admin can edit.
admin_schedules_assignment_disabled: Assignment is disabled until schedules, tests, and users load successfully.
admin_schedules_search_placeholder: Search by learner, test, or note...
admin_schedules_no_match: No schedules match the current filters.
admin_schedules_clear_filters_hint: Clear the search or mode filter to restore the current schedule list.
admin_schedules_empty_hint: Assigned learner schedules will appear here once tests are scheduled.
admin_schedules_all_loaded: All learner schedule records currently loaded
admin_schedules_needs_retry: Schedule list needs a retry before editing
admin_schedules_bootstrap_schedules_fail: Existing schedules could not be loaded. Retry before editing or assigning schedules.
admin_schedules_bootstrap_partial_failed: Some assignment lookup data could not be loaded. Existing schedules remain visible, but assigning new schedules is temporarily disabled.
admin_favorites_external_links_helper: Public report URLs or other external pages
admin_favorites_page_subtitle: Quick links to reports you use often
admin_favorites_link_hint: Use a public URL or a supported admin route such as `/admin/reports`.
admin_favorites_no_match: No favorites match the current filters.
admin_favorites_clear_filters_hint: Clear the current search or type filter to restore the saved report shortcuts.
admin_favorites_route_gone_warning: This saved route no longer exists in the current MVP navigation.

admin_templates_config_must_be_object: Config must be a JSON object.
admin_templates_no_match: No templates match the current filters.

admin_subscribers_no_match: No subscribers match the current search.
admin_subscribers_clear_search_hint: Clear the current search to restore the saved recipients.
admin_questions_hint_ordering: Enter items in order, one per line. The correct order is top-to-bottom. Leave correct_answer blank (auto-derived).
admin_questions_hint_fillinblank: Use [blank] in the question text as a placeholder. Enter each acceptable answer on its own line in the options field.
admin_questions_hint_matching: Enter pairs as Left | Right, one pair per line. Set correct_answer to the matched pair indices.
admin_questions_hint_text: Open-ended text question. No options required. Enter a model or expected answer in correct_answer for reference grading.
admin_candidates_tab_description: Assigned learners stay visible here even before they start the test, so the roster and attempt activity are tracked in one place.
admin_candidates_no_learners: No learners or attempts are assigned to this test yet.
admin_candidates_not_started: Learner has not started this test yet
admin_sessions_requirement_hint: Every testing session requires both a learner and a scheduled date/time.
admin_manage_card_loaded_attempts_helper: All attempts currently linked to this test
admin_manage_card_paused_helper: Attempts currently paused by supervision rules
admin_manage_card_flagged_helper: Attempts with high or medium alert activity
admin_manage_overview_status_published_h: Learners can access the test based on assignment rules
admin_manage_overview_questions_linked: Real question bank linked to this test
admin_manage_overview_questions_empty: Questions still need to be added
admin_manage_overview_sessions_persisted: Learner assignments and schedules are persisted
admin_manage_overview_review_enabled: Answer review is enabled after submission
admin_manage_overview_review_hidden: Answer review is hidden from learners
admin_manage_lifecycle_assign_hint: Assign at least one learner session to move this test into the live cycle.
admin_manage_lifecycle_based_on_records: Based on persisted testing session records.
admin_manage_lifecycle_no_proctoring: No live proctoring checks are enabled.
admin_manage_lifecycle_no_certificate: No post-pass certificate is currently issued.
admin_manage_lifecycle_no_retake: Learners cannot open a new attempt after submission.
admin_manage_lifecycle_flagged_need_revi: Attempts with high or medium proctoring alerts need review.
admin_manage_lifecycle_no_flagged: No flagged attempts are waiting in the review queue.
